records.m_Talk_ENG: Checking vitals...! Body temperature, breathing, pulse, and blood pressure all unstable!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Checking vitals...! Body temperature, breathing, pulse, and blood pressure all unstable!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Checking vitals...! Body temperature, breathing, pulse, and blood pressure all unstable!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Begin stabilization! Prep the anesthesia! If it gets worse, we'll need emergency surgery!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Begin stabilization! Prep the anesthesia! If it gets worse, we'll need emergency surgery!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Begin stabilization! Prep the anesthesia! If it gets worse, we'll need emergency surgery!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How is the Bishop?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How is the Bishop?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How is the Bishop?

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's past the worst of it, but still unconscious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's past the worst of it, but still unconscious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's past the worst of it, but still unconscious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll have to... keep monitoring him for now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll have to... keep monitoring him for now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll have to... keep monitoring him for now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Medea, are you all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dame Medea, are you all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dame Medea, are you all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't mind me. You've done well with the surgery.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't mind me. You've done well with the surgery.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't mind me. You've done well with the surgery.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please contact me as soon as the Bishop regains consciousness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please contact me as soon as the Bishop regains consciousness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please contact me as soon as the Bishop regains consciousness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *...Sigh*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *...Sigh*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *...Sigh*

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're telling me there was a traitor inside HQ?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're telling me there was a traitor inside HQ?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're telling me there was a traitor inside HQ?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It seems they've maintained close ties with Red Shift for some time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It seems they've maintained close ties with Red Shift for some time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It seems they've maintained close ties with Red Shift for some time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They were behind both the leaked plans and the jamming of the operation team's comms.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They were behind both the leaked plans and the jamming of the operation team's comms.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They were behind both the leaked plans and the jamming of the operation team's comms.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you're... just now telling me this?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you're... just now telling me this?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you're... just now telling me this?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You knew this operation was everything, and yet you speak so carelessly...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You knew this operation was everything, and yet you speak so carelessly...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You knew this operation was everything, and yet you speak so carelessly...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well. At this point, I have to wonder.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well. At this point, I have to wonder.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well. At this point, I have to wonder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if things had gone according to plan, could we really have won?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if things had gone according to plan, could we really have won?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if things had gone according to plan, could we really have won?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Order specializes in killing Shadows, not humans.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Order specializes in killing Shadows, not humans.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Order specializes in killing Shadows, not humans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How can a knight, sworn to protect, engage in a duel to the death?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How can a knight, sworn to protect, engage in a duel to the death?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How can a knight, sworn to protect, engage in a duel to the death?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This war has been a burden from the very start.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This war has been a burden from the very start.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This war has been a burden from the very start.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Frayder. Are you suggesting we surrender to Red Shift?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Frayder. Are you suggesting we surrender to Red Shift?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Frayder. Are you suggesting we surrender to Red Shift?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Their goal isn't the Order. It's the Star Armaments.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Their goal isn't the Order. It's the Star Armaments.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Their goal isn't the Order. It's the Star Armaments.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if that goes against the justice we've upheld...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if that goes against the justice we've upheld...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if that goes against the justice we've upheld...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shouldn't we at least consider a tactical retreat, for the future's sake?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shouldn't we at least consider a tactical retreat, for the future's sake?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shouldn't we at least consider a tactical retreat, for the future's sake?

records.m_Talk_ENG: All the underlying tensions in the Order have exploded at once.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All the underlying tensions in the Order have exploded at once.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All the underlying tensions in the Order have exploded at once.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've hit our limit... We can't handle this with internal forces alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've hit our limit... We can't handle this with internal forces alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've hit our limit... We can't handle this with internal forces alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Medea, are you all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Medea, are you all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Medea, are you all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're annoying. Go away, Glasses.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're annoying. Go away, Glasses.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're annoying. Go away, Glasses.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, I wish I could but I can't. Deputy has woken up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, I wish I could but I can't. Deputy has woken up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, I wish I could but I can't. Deputy has woken up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's asking for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's asking for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's asking for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fione? She's asking for me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fione? She's asking for me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fione? She's asking for me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Take me to her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Take me to her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Take me to her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Easy there, Deputy! What if you collapse again?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Easy there, Deputy! What if you collapse again?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Easy there, Deputy! What if you collapse again?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine. Moving around is a bit uncomfortable, but most of my injuries have healed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine. Moving around is a bit uncomfortable, but most of my injuries have healed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine. Moving around is a bit uncomfortable, but most of my injuries have healed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Arius has been taken. I can't just sit here doing nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dame Arius has been taken. I can't just sit here doing nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dame Arius has been taken. I can't just sit here doing nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think we don't know that?! But anyone can see you're still overdoing it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think we don't know that?! But anyone can see you're still overdoing it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think we don't know that?! But anyone can see you're still overdoing it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy, as requested, I've brought Dame Medea.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy, as requested, I've brought Dame Medea.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy, as requested, I've brought Dame Medea.

records.m_Talk_ENG: May we come in?
records.m_Talk_DEU: May we come in?
records.m_Talk_FRA: May we come in?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Please.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Please.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Please.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Forgive me, Dame Medea. I know you're busy, and I've taken up your time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Forgive me, Dame Medea. I know you're busy, and I've taken up your time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Forgive me, Dame Medea. I know you're busy, and I've taken up your time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be silly. And no need to get up. Lie down if you must.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be silly. And no need to get up. Lie down if you must.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be silly. And no need to get up. Lie down if you must.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine. I'm able to move with no problem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine. I'm able to move with no problem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine. I'm able to move with no problem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold it! What are you even saying right now, Deputy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold it! What are you even saying right now, Deputy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold it! What are you even saying right now, Deputy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you lying saying that everything's fine?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you lying saying that everything's fine?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you lying saying that everything's fine?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please, Dame Liv.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please, Dame Liv.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please, Dame Liv.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, ever since Captain vanished, you've turned into a total stubborn mule.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, ever since Captain vanished, you've turned into a total stubborn mule.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, ever since Captain vanished, you've turned into a total stubborn mule.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fine. But don't overdo it, all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fine. But don't overdo it, all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fine. But don't overdo it, all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. That was a bit of a commotion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. That was a bit of a commotion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. That was a bit of a commotion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Back to the point. I'll explain why I asked you here, Dame Medea.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Back to the point. I'll explain why I asked you here, Dame Medea.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Back to the point. I'll explain why I asked you here, Dame Medea.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're about to ask me to authorize an assault on Red Shift, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're about to ask me to authorize an assault on Red Shift, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're about to ask me to authorize an assault on Red Shift, aren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Absolutely not. I won't allow it. Especially not you all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Absolutely not. I won't allow it. Especially not you all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Absolutely not. I won't allow it. Especially not you all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Medea. Red Shift's captain has taken Dame Arius hostage!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dame Medea. Red Shift's captain has taken Dame Arius hostage!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dame Medea. Red Shift's captain has taken Dame Arius hostage!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And how exactly do you plan to find Red Shift, when we don't even know where they are?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And how exactly do you plan to find Red Shift, when we don't even know where they are?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And how exactly do you plan to find Red Shift, when we don't even know where they are?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And even if you did find them, can you win? After what happened with Carantisir?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And even if you did find them, can you win? After what happened with Carantisir?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And even if you did find them, can you win? After what happened with Carantisir?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Arius became a hostage trying to save me. Are you telling me to just sit here and do nothing?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dame Arius became a hostage trying to save me. Are you telling me to just sit here and do nothing?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dame Arius became a hostage trying to save me. Are you telling me to just sit here and do nothing?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fione. The Order's in chaos, and the Elders are barely taking any action.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fione. The Order's in chaos, and the Elders are barely taking any action.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fione. The Order's in chaos, and the Elders are barely taking any action.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm frustrated too, but right now, we just...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm frustrated too, but right now, we just...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm frustrated too, but right now, we just...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That doesn't sound like you, Dame Medea.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That doesn't sound like you, Dame Medea.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That doesn't sound like you, Dame Medea.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have the back-to-back defeats finally broken you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have the back-to-back defeats finally broken you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have the back-to-back defeats finally broken you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If so, that would be quite a shame.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If so, that would be quite a shame.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If so, that would be quite a shame.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You might not match for former captain or deputy, but I had some respect for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You might not match for former captain or deputy, but I had some respect for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You might not match for former captain or deputy, but I had some respect for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
What the
8g?! Where did he come from?!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
What the
8g?! Where did he come from?!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
What the
8g?! Where did he come from?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the comms. Just like last time, he's hijacked the Order's comms network.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the comms. Just like last time, he's hijacked the Order's comms network.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the comms. Just like last time, he's hijacked the Order's comms network.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Carantisir...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Carantisir...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Carantisir...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What have you done to Dame Arius?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What have you done to Dame Arius?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What have you done to Dame Arius?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watch your tongue, filth. You think you have the right to speak to me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watch your tongue, filth. You think you have the right to speak to me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watch your tongue, filth. You think you have the right to speak to me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why you...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why you...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why you...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You wouldn't go this far without a reason.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You wouldn't go this far without a reason.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You wouldn't go this far without a reason.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What message are you trying to send by hijacking our entire network?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What message are you trying to send by hijacking our entire network?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What message are you trying to send by hijacking our entire network?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just making sure there are enough guests for the banquet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just making sure there are enough guests for the banquet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just making sure there are enough guests for the banquet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you want to save Esquede's daughter...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you want to save Esquede's daughter...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you want to save Esquede's daughter...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to the place you're already familiar with. The Qliphoth Game's former battleground.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to the place you're already familiar with. The Qliphoth Game's former battleground.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to the place you're already familiar with. The Qliphoth Game's former battleground.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Qliphoth Game? What, does he think he's the Demon Lord now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Qliphoth Game? What, does he think he's the Demon Lord now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Qliphoth Game? What, does he think he's the Demon Lord now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Regardless of the rules, the fact that he's chosen the battlefield himself is essentially a declaration of war.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Regardless of the rules, the fact that he's chosen the battlefield himself is essentially a declaration of war.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Regardless of the rules, the fact that he's chosen the battlefield himself is essentially a declaration of war.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if other TASKFORCEs intervene, they stand to gain nothing. It's an outright provocation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if other TASKFORCEs intervene, they stand to gain nothing. It's an outright provocation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if other TASKFORCEs intervene, they stand to gain nothing. It's an outright provocation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wonder how many of you would act for the Order with no promise of gain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wonder how many of you would act for the Order with no promise of gain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wonder how many of you would act for the Order with no promise of gain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're hoping to see a reaction to such childish provocation, I can show you one myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're hoping to see a reaction to such childish provocation, I can show you one myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're hoping to see a reaction to such childish provocation, I can show you one myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No need to get worked up. If it's a knight's duel, I'll follow the proper formalities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No need to get worked up. If it's a knight's duel, I'll follow the proper formalities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No need to get worked up. If it's a knight's duel, I'll follow the proper formalities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hereby declare.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hereby declare.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hereby declare.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll deploy Doppelganger-type C.O.s forged through necromancy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll deploy Doppelganger-type C.O.s forged through necromancy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll deploy Doppelganger-type C.O.s forged through necromancy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike the Shadows you specialize in, these may have once been actual, living humans.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike the Shadows you specialize in, these may have once been actual, living humans.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike the Shadows you specialize in, these may have once been actual, living humans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And Red Shift will fight at full strength to wipe out Blue Shift.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And Red Shift will fight at full strength to wipe out Blue Shift.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And Red Shift will fight at full strength to wipe out Blue Shift.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're ready to swing your sword to kill...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're ready to swing your sword to kill...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're ready to swing your sword to kill...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come face us with every ounce of your pride.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come face us with every ounce of your pride.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come face us with every ounce of your pride.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will you cling to the outdated traditions of the past, or chase glory in the name of order...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will you cling to the outdated traditions of the past, or chase glory in the name of order...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will you cling to the outdated traditions of the past, or chase glory in the name of order...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see how you intend to resolve the foolish sins of your ancestors. I'll be waiting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see how you intend to resolve the foolish sins of your ancestors. I'll be waiting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see how you intend to resolve the foolish sins of your ancestors. I'll be waiting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't, Fione.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't, Fione.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't, Fione.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Apologies, Dame Medea.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Apologies, Dame Medea.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apologies, Dame Medea.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it means disobeying orders, I have no choice but to act on my own will this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it means disobeying orders, I have no choice but to act on my own will this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it means disobeying orders, I have no choice but to act on my own will this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Exactly. After a provocation like that, what's there to debate?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Exactly. After a provocation like that, what's there to debate?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Exactly. After a provocation like that, what's there to debate?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We go in, take them down, and rescue Dame Arius.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We go in, take them down, and rescue Dame Arius.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We go in, take them down, and rescue Dame Arius.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I do nothing now, I'll never become the knight I aspire to be.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I do nothing now, I'll never become the knight I aspire to be.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I do nothing now, I'll never become the knight I aspire to be.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I won't back down this time either!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I won't back down this time either!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I won't back down this time either!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know. Of course I know what all of you are trying to say.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know. Of course I know what all of you are trying to say.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know. Of course I know what all of you are trying to say.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
But what can you just the three of you
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
But what can you just the three of you
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
But what can you just the three of you
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Only three? That's a bit rude, Dame Medea.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Only three? That's a bit rude, Dame Medea.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Only three? That's a bit rude, Dame Medea.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if we haven't been chosen by the Armaments, we're still knights who follow the stars.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if we haven't been chosen by the Armaments, we're still knights who follow the stars.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if we haven't been chosen by the Armaments, we're still knights who follow the stars.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All active Blue Shift knights are prepped and ready.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All active Blue Shift knights are prepped and ready.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All active Blue Shift knights are prepped and ready.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Say the word, and we'll move out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Say the word, and we'll move out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Say the word, and we'll move out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've hated those guys from the start! Let's make them pay for our comrades!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've hated those guys from the start! Let's make them pay for our comrades!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've hated those guys from the start! Let's make them pay for our comrades!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've fought them twice already, what's a third round? Let's go get Dame Arius!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've fought them twice already, what's a third round? Let's go get Dame Arius!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've fought them twice already, what's a third round? Let's go get Dame Arius!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: E-everyone, calm down! Red Shift isn't an enemy we can beat just with passion!
records.m_Talk_DEU: E-everyone, calm down! Red Shift isn't an enemy we can beat just with passion!
records.m_Talk_FRA: E-everyone, calm down! Red Shift isn't an enemy we can beat just with passion!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
You're falling right into their trap! What are you all thinki
8 8
records.m_Talk_DEU:
You're falling right into their trap! What are you all thinki
8 8
records.m_Talk_FRA:
You're falling right into their trap! What are you all thinki
8 8

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-hold on. Let me take this call.
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-hold on. Let me take this call.
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-hold on. Let me take this call.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You...! Where have you been?! Why are you only calling now?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You...! Where have you been?! Why are you only calling now?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You...! Where have you been?! Why are you only calling now?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you even realize what's going on at HQ right now?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you even realize what's going on at HQ right now?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you even realize what's going on at HQ right now?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How should I know? Who are you to yell at me, with your low rank?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How should I know? Who are you to yell at me, with your low rank?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How should I know? Who are you to yell at me, with your low rank?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me?! I'm with the Elders now! I outrank you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me?! I'm with the Elders now! I outrank you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me?! I'm with the Elders now! I outrank you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you hadn't ghosted on us the day of the mission, we wouldn't be in this mess to begin with!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you hadn't ghosted on us the day of the mission, we wouldn't be in this mess to begin with!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you hadn't ghosted on us the day of the mission, we wouldn't be in this mess to begin with!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Geez, stop whining. If the Order's that pathetic without me, maybe it should just collapse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Geez, stop whining. If the Order's that pathetic without me, maybe it should just collapse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Geez, stop whining. If the Order's that pathetic without me, maybe it should just collapse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, just tell me what the others are doing. I've already gotten the gist through TRS.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, just tell me what the others are doing. I've already gotten the gist through TRS.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, just tell me what the others are doing. I've already gotten the gist through TRS.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't it obvious?! Everyone's scrambling to go in. It's chaos out here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't it obvious?! Everyone's scrambling to go in. It's chaos out here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't it obvious?! Everyone's scrambling to go in. It's chaos out here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're not idiots. They know it's probably a trap, even with Arius as a hostage...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're not idiots. They know it's probably a trap, even with Arius as a hostage...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're not idiots. They know it's probably a trap, even with Arius as a hostage...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perfect. I'll meet you there, then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perfect. I'll meet you there, then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perfect. I'll meet you there, then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And hey, don't forget to read the room and not to get in my way, all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And hey, don't forget to read the room and not to get in my way, all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And hey, don't forget to read the room and not to get in my way, all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Right. Of course, everyone in this Order is an idiot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Right. Of course, everyone in this Order is an idiot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Right. Of course, everyone in this Order is an idiot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aah! Whatever!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aah! Whatever!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aah! Whatever!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Load supplies onto the ship! Full combat readiness, everyone! We're going in, all out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Load supplies onto the ship! Full combat readiness, everyone! We're going in, all out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Load supplies onto the ship! Full combat readiness, everyone! We're going in, all out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyone got a problem with that? Raise your hand!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyone got a problem with that? Raise your hand!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyone got a problem with that? Raise your hand!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll raise our justice high along the orbit marked by the Star Guide!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll raise our justice high along the orbit marked by the Star Guide!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll raise our justice high along the orbit marked by the Star Guide!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yup! That's what I thought!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yup! That's what I thought!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yup! That's what I thought!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Hansol. Is it just me, or did your sister's personality totally flip?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Hansol. Is it just me, or did your sister's personality totally flip?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Hansol. Is it just me, or did your sister's personality totally flip?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I have no idea what you're talking about...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I have no idea what you're talking about...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I have no idea what you're talking about...

records.m_Talk_ENG: As the spearhead of the Order, we cannot afford another failure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As the spearhead of the Order, we cannot afford another failure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As the spearhead of the Order, we cannot afford another failure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This time, we will...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This time, we will...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This time, we will...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Make up for all our past mistakes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Make up for all our past mistakes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Make up for all our past mistakes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't lose anything ever again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't lose anything ever again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't lose anything ever again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is my definition of justice... and the pride I hold as a knight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is my definition of justice... and the pride I hold as a knight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is my definition of justice... and the pride I hold as a knight.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
No matter how desperately you struggle
8v the outcome will not change.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
No matter how desperately you struggle
8v the outcome will not change.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
No matter how desperately you struggle
8v the outcome will not change.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, let the battle begin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, let the battle begin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, let the battle begin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come, Blue Shift.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come, Blue Shift.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come, Blue Shift.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Checking vitals...! Body temperature, breathing, pulse, and blood pressure all unstable!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Checking vitals...! Body temperature, breathing, pulse, and blood pressure all unstable!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Checking vitals...! Body temperature, breathing, pulse, and blood pressure all unstable!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Begin stabilization! Prep the anesthesia! If it gets worse, we'll need emergency surgery!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Begin stabilization! Prep the anesthesia! If it gets worse, we'll need emergency surgery!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Begin stabilization! Prep the anesthesia! If it gets worse, we'll need emergency surgery!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How is the Bishop?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How is the Bishop?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How is the Bishop?

root.m_Talk_ENG: He's past the worst of it, but still unconscious.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He's past the worst of it, but still unconscious.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He's past the worst of it, but still unconscious.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll have to... keep monitoring him for now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll have to... keep monitoring him for now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll have to... keep monitoring him for now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Medea, are you all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dame Medea, are you all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dame Medea, are you all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't mind me. You've done well with the surgery.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't mind me. You've done well with the surgery.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't mind me. You've done well with the surgery.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please contact me as soon as the Bishop regains consciousness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please contact me as soon as the Bishop regains consciousness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please contact me as soon as the Bishop regains consciousness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *...Sigh*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *...Sigh*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *...Sigh*

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're telling me there was a traitor inside HQ?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're telling me there was a traitor inside HQ?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're telling me there was a traitor inside HQ?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It seems they've maintained close ties with Red Shift for some time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It seems they've maintained close ties with Red Shift for some time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It seems they've maintained close ties with Red Shift for some time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They were behind both the leaked plans and the jamming of the operation team's comms.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They were behind both the leaked plans and the jamming of the operation team's comms.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They were behind both the leaked plans and the jamming of the operation team's comms.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you're... just now telling me this?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you're... just now telling me this?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you're... just now telling me this?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You knew this operation was everything, and yet you speak so carelessly...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You knew this operation was everything, and yet you speak so carelessly...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You knew this operation was everything, and yet you speak so carelessly...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well. At this point, I have to wonder.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well. At this point, I have to wonder.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well. At this point, I have to wonder.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if things had gone according to plan, could we really have won?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if things had gone according to plan, could we really have won?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if things had gone according to plan, could we really have won?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Order specializes in killing Shadows, not humans.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Order specializes in killing Shadows, not humans.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Order specializes in killing Shadows, not humans.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How can a knight, sworn to protect, engage in a duel to the death?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How can a knight, sworn to protect, engage in a duel to the death?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How can a knight, sworn to protect, engage in a duel to the death?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This war has been a burden from the very start.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This war has been a burden from the very start.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This war has been a burden from the very start.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Frayder. Are you suggesting we surrender to Red Shift?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Frayder. Are you suggesting we surrender to Red Shift?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Frayder. Are you suggesting we surrender to Red Shift?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Their goal isn't the Order. It's the Star Armaments.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Their goal isn't the Order. It's the Star Armaments.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Their goal isn't the Order. It's the Star Armaments.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if that goes against the justice we've upheld...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if that goes against the justice we've upheld...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if that goes against the justice we've upheld...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shouldn't we at least consider a tactical retreat, for the future's sake?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shouldn't we at least consider a tactical retreat, for the future's sake?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shouldn't we at least consider a tactical retreat, for the future's sake?

root.m_Talk_ENG: All the underlying tensions in the Order have exploded at once.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All the underlying tensions in the Order have exploded at once.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All the underlying tensions in the Order have exploded at once.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We've hit our limit... We can't handle this with internal forces alone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We've hit our limit... We can't handle this with internal forces alone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We've hit our limit... We can't handle this with internal forces alone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Medea, are you all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Medea, are you all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Medea, are you all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're annoying. Go away, Glasses.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're annoying. Go away, Glasses.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're annoying. Go away, Glasses.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, I wish I could but I can't. Deputy has woken up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, I wish I could but I can't. Deputy has woken up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, I wish I could but I can't. Deputy has woken up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's asking for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's asking for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's asking for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fione? She's asking for me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fione? She's asking for me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fione? She's asking for me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Take me to her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Take me to her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Take me to her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Easy there, Deputy! What if you collapse again?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Easy there, Deputy! What if you collapse again?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Easy there, Deputy! What if you collapse again?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine. Moving around is a bit uncomfortable, but most of my injuries have healed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine. Moving around is a bit uncomfortable, but most of my injuries have healed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine. Moving around is a bit uncomfortable, but most of my injuries have healed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Arius has been taken. I can't just sit here doing nothing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dame Arius has been taken. I can't just sit here doing nothing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dame Arius has been taken. I can't just sit here doing nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You think we don't know that?! But anyone can see you're still overdoing it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You think we don't know that?! But anyone can see you're still overdoing it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You think we don't know that?! But anyone can see you're still overdoing it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy, as requested, I've brought Dame Medea.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy, as requested, I've brought Dame Medea.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy, as requested, I've brought Dame Medea.

root.m_Talk_ENG: May we come in?
root.m_Talk_DEU: May we come in?
root.m_Talk_FRA: May we come in?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Please.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Please.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Please.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Forgive me, Dame Medea. I know you're busy, and I've taken up your time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Forgive me, Dame Medea. I know you're busy, and I've taken up your time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Forgive me, Dame Medea. I know you're busy, and I've taken up your time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be silly. And no need to get up. Lie down if you must.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be silly. And no need to get up. Lie down if you must.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be silly. And no need to get up. Lie down if you must.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine. I'm able to move with no problem.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine. I'm able to move with no problem.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine. I'm able to move with no problem.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hold it! What are you even saying right now, Deputy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hold it! What are you even saying right now, Deputy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hold it! What are you even saying right now, Deputy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you lying saying that everything's fine?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you lying saying that everything's fine?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you lying saying that everything's fine?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please, Dame Liv.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please, Dame Liv.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please, Dame Liv.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, ever since Captain vanished, you've turned into a total stubborn mule.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, ever since Captain vanished, you've turned into a total stubborn mule.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, ever since Captain vanished, you've turned into a total stubborn mule.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fine. But don't overdo it, all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fine. But don't overdo it, all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fine. But don't overdo it, all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. That was a bit of a commotion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. That was a bit of a commotion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. That was a bit of a commotion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Back to the point. I'll explain why I asked you here, Dame Medea.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Back to the point. I'll explain why I asked you here, Dame Medea.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Back to the point. I'll explain why I asked you here, Dame Medea.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're about to ask me to authorize an assault on Red Shift, aren't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're about to ask me to authorize an assault on Red Shift, aren't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're about to ask me to authorize an assault on Red Shift, aren't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Absolutely not. I won't allow it. Especially not you all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Absolutely not. I won't allow it. Especially not you all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Absolutely not. I won't allow it. Especially not you all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Medea. Red Shift's captain has taken Dame Arius hostage!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dame Medea. Red Shift's captain has taken Dame Arius hostage!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dame Medea. Red Shift's captain has taken Dame Arius hostage!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And how exactly do you plan to find Red Shift, when we don't even know where they are?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And how exactly do you plan to find Red Shift, when we don't even know where they are?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And how exactly do you plan to find Red Shift, when we don't even know where they are?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And even if you did find them, can you win? After what happened with Carantisir?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And even if you did find them, can you win? After what happened with Carantisir?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And even if you did find them, can you win? After what happened with Carantisir?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Arius became a hostage trying to save me. Are you telling me to just sit here and do nothing?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dame Arius became a hostage trying to save me. Are you telling me to just sit here and do nothing?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dame Arius became a hostage trying to save me. Are you telling me to just sit here and do nothing?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fione. The Order's in chaos, and the Elders are barely taking any action.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fione. The Order's in chaos, and the Elders are barely taking any action.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fione. The Order's in chaos, and the Elders are barely taking any action.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm frustrated too, but right now, we just...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm frustrated too, but right now, we just...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm frustrated too, but right now, we just...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That doesn't sound like you, Dame Medea.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That doesn't sound like you, Dame Medea.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That doesn't sound like you, Dame Medea.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have the back-to-back defeats finally broken you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have the back-to-back defeats finally broken you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have the back-to-back defeats finally broken you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If so, that would be quite a shame.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If so, that would be quite a shame.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If so, that would be quite a shame.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You might not match for former captain or deputy, but I had some respect for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You might not match for former captain or deputy, but I had some respect for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You might not match for former captain or deputy, but I had some respect for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
What the
8g?! Where did he come from?!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
What the
8g?! Where did he come from?!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
What the
8g?! Where did he come from?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's the comms. Just like last time, he's hijacked the Order's comms network.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's the comms. Just like last time, he's hijacked the Order's comms network.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's the comms. Just like last time, he's hijacked the Order's comms network.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Carantisir...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Carantisir...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Carantisir...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What have you done to Dame Arius?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What have you done to Dame Arius?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What have you done to Dame Arius?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Watch your tongue, filth. You think you have the right to speak to me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Watch your tongue, filth. You think you have the right to speak to me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Watch your tongue, filth. You think you have the right to speak to me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why you...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why you...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why you...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You wouldn't go this far without a reason.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You wouldn't go this far without a reason.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You wouldn't go this far without a reason.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What message are you trying to send by hijacking our entire network?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What message are you trying to send by hijacking our entire network?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What message are you trying to send by hijacking our entire network?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just making sure there are enough guests for the banquet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just making sure there are enough guests for the banquet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just making sure there are enough guests for the banquet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you want to save Esquede's daughter...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you want to save Esquede's daughter...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you want to save Esquede's daughter...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come to the place you're already familiar with. The Qliphoth Game's former battleground.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come to the place you're already familiar with. The Qliphoth Game's former battleground.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come to the place you're already familiar with. The Qliphoth Game's former battleground.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Qliphoth Game? What, does he think he's the Demon Lord now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Qliphoth Game? What, does he think he's the Demon Lord now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Qliphoth Game? What, does he think he's the Demon Lord now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Regardless of the rules, the fact that he's chosen the battlefield himself is essentially a declaration of war.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Regardless of the rules, the fact that he's chosen the battlefield himself is essentially a declaration of war.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Regardless of the rules, the fact that he's chosen the battlefield himself is essentially a declaration of war.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And if other TASKFORCEs intervene, they stand to gain nothing. It's an outright provocation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And if other TASKFORCEs intervene, they stand to gain nothing. It's an outright provocation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And if other TASKFORCEs intervene, they stand to gain nothing. It's an outright provocation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I wonder how many of you would act for the Order with no promise of gain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I wonder how many of you would act for the Order with no promise of gain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I wonder how many of you would act for the Order with no promise of gain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're hoping to see a reaction to such childish provocation, I can show you one myself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're hoping to see a reaction to such childish provocation, I can show you one myself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're hoping to see a reaction to such childish provocation, I can show you one myself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No need to get worked up. If it's a knight's duel, I'll follow the proper formalities.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No need to get worked up. If it's a knight's duel, I'll follow the proper formalities.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No need to get worked up. If it's a knight's duel, I'll follow the proper formalities.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hereby declare.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hereby declare.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hereby declare.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll deploy Doppelganger-type C.O.s forged through necromancy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll deploy Doppelganger-type C.O.s forged through necromancy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll deploy Doppelganger-type C.O.s forged through necromancy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike the Shadows you specialize in, these may have once been actual, living humans.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike the Shadows you specialize in, these may have once been actual, living humans.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike the Shadows you specialize in, these may have once been actual, living humans.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And Red Shift will fight at full strength to wipe out Blue Shift.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And Red Shift will fight at full strength to wipe out Blue Shift.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And Red Shift will fight at full strength to wipe out Blue Shift.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're ready to swing your sword to kill...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're ready to swing your sword to kill...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're ready to swing your sword to kill...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come face us with every ounce of your pride.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come face us with every ounce of your pride.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come face us with every ounce of your pride.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Will you cling to the outdated traditions of the past, or chase glory in the name of order...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Will you cling to the outdated traditions of the past, or chase glory in the name of order...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Will you cling to the outdated traditions of the past, or chase glory in the name of order...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see how you intend to resolve the foolish sins of your ancestors. I'll be waiting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see how you intend to resolve the foolish sins of your ancestors. I'll be waiting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see how you intend to resolve the foolish sins of your ancestors. I'll be waiting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't, Fione.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't, Fione.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't, Fione.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Apologies, Dame Medea.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Apologies, Dame Medea.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Apologies, Dame Medea.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it means disobeying orders, I have no choice but to act on my own will this time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it means disobeying orders, I have no choice but to act on my own will this time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it means disobeying orders, I have no choice but to act on my own will this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Exactly. After a provocation like that, what's there to debate?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Exactly. After a provocation like that, what's there to debate?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Exactly. After a provocation like that, what's there to debate?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We go in, take them down, and rescue Dame Arius.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We go in, take them down, and rescue Dame Arius.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We go in, take them down, and rescue Dame Arius.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I do nothing now, I'll never become the knight I aspire to be.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I do nothing now, I'll never become the knight I aspire to be.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I do nothing now, I'll never become the knight I aspire to be.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I won't back down this time either!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I won't back down this time either!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I won't back down this time either!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know. Of course I know what all of you are trying to say.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know. Of course I know what all of you are trying to say.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know. Of course I know what all of you are trying to say.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
But what can you just the three of you
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
But what can you just the three of you
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
But what can you just the three of you
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Only three? That's a bit rude, Dame Medea.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Only three? That's a bit rude, Dame Medea.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Only three? That's a bit rude, Dame Medea.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if we haven't been chosen by the Armaments, we're still knights who follow the stars.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if we haven't been chosen by the Armaments, we're still knights who follow the stars.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if we haven't been chosen by the Armaments, we're still knights who follow the stars.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All active Blue Shift knights are prepped and ready.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All active Blue Shift knights are prepped and ready.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All active Blue Shift knights are prepped and ready.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Say the word, and we'll move out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Say the word, and we'll move out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Say the word, and we'll move out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've hated those guys from the start! Let's make them pay for our comrades!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've hated those guys from the start! Let's make them pay for our comrades!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've hated those guys from the start! Let's make them pay for our comrades!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We've fought them twice already, what's a third round? Let's go get Dame Arius!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We've fought them twice already, what's a third round? Let's go get Dame Arius!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We've fought them twice already, what's a third round? Let's go get Dame Arius!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: E-everyone, calm down! Red Shift isn't an enemy we can beat just with passion!
root.m_Talk_DEU: E-everyone, calm down! Red Shift isn't an enemy we can beat just with passion!
root.m_Talk_FRA: E-everyone, calm down! Red Shift isn't an enemy we can beat just with passion!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
You're falling right into their trap! What are you all thinki
8 8
root.m_Talk_DEU:
You're falling right into their trap! What are you all thinki
8 8
root.m_Talk_FRA:
You're falling right into their trap! What are you all thinki
8 8

root.m_Talk_ENG: H-hold on. Let me take this call.
root.m_Talk_DEU: H-hold on. Let me take this call.
root.m_Talk_FRA: H-hold on. Let me take this call.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You...! Where have you been?! Why are you only calling now?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You...! Where have you been?! Why are you only calling now?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You...! Where have you been?! Why are you only calling now?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you even realize what's going on at HQ right now?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you even realize what's going on at HQ right now?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you even realize what's going on at HQ right now?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How should I know? Who are you to yell at me, with your low rank?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How should I know? Who are you to yell at me, with your low rank?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How should I know? Who are you to yell at me, with your low rank?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me?! I'm with the Elders now! I outrank you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me?! I'm with the Elders now! I outrank you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me?! I'm with the Elders now! I outrank you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you hadn't ghosted on us the day of the mission, we wouldn't be in this mess to begin with!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you hadn't ghosted on us the day of the mission, we wouldn't be in this mess to begin with!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you hadn't ghosted on us the day of the mission, we wouldn't be in this mess to begin with!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Geez, stop whining. If the Order's that pathetic without me, maybe it should just collapse.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Geez, stop whining. If the Order's that pathetic without me, maybe it should just collapse.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Geez, stop whining. If the Order's that pathetic without me, maybe it should just collapse.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, just tell me what the others are doing. I've already gotten the gist through TRS.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, just tell me what the others are doing. I've already gotten the gist through TRS.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, just tell me what the others are doing. I've already gotten the gist through TRS.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't it obvious?! Everyone's scrambling to go in. It's chaos out here!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't it obvious?! Everyone's scrambling to go in. It's chaos out here!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't it obvious?! Everyone's scrambling to go in. It's chaos out here!

root.m_Talk_ENG: They're not idiots. They know it's probably a trap, even with Arius as a hostage...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: They're not idiots. They know it's probably a trap, even with Arius as a hostage...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're not idiots. They know it's probably a trap, even with Arius as a hostage...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Perfect. I'll meet you there, then.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Perfect. I'll meet you there, then.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Perfect. I'll meet you there, then.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And hey, don't forget to read the room and not to get in my way, all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And hey, don't forget to read the room and not to get in my way, all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And hey, don't forget to read the room and not to get in my way, all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Right. Of course, everyone in this Order is an idiot.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Right. Of course, everyone in this Order is an idiot.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Right. Of course, everyone in this Order is an idiot.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aah! Whatever!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aah! Whatever!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aah! Whatever!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Load supplies onto the ship! Full combat readiness, everyone! We're going in, all out!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Load supplies onto the ship! Full combat readiness, everyone! We're going in, all out!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Load supplies onto the ship! Full combat readiness, everyone! We're going in, all out!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyone got a problem with that? Raise your hand!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyone got a problem with that? Raise your hand!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyone got a problem with that? Raise your hand!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll raise our justice high along the orbit marked by the Star Guide!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll raise our justice high along the orbit marked by the Star Guide!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll raise our justice high along the orbit marked by the Star Guide!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yup! That's what I thought!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yup! That's what I thought!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yup! That's what I thought!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Hansol. Is it just me, or did your sister's personality totally flip?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Hansol. Is it just me, or did your sister's personality totally flip?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Hansol. Is it just me, or did your sister's personality totally flip?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I have no idea what you're talking about...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I have no idea what you're talking about...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I have no idea what you're talking about...

root.m_Talk_ENG: As the spearhead of the Order, we cannot afford another failure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As the spearhead of the Order, we cannot afford another failure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As the spearhead of the Order, we cannot afford another failure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This time, we will...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This time, we will...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This time, we will...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Make up for all our past mistakes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Make up for all our past mistakes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Make up for all our past mistakes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I won't lose anything ever again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I won't lose anything ever again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I won't lose anything ever again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is my definition of justice... and the pride I hold as a knight.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is my definition of justice... and the pride I hold as a knight.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is my definition of justice... and the pride I hold as a knight.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
No matter how desperately you struggle
8v the outcome will not change.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
No matter how desperately you struggle
8v the outcome will not change.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
No matter how desperately you struggle
8v the outcome will not change.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, let the battle begin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, let the battle begin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, let the battle begin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come, Blue Shift.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come, Blue Shift.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come, Blue Shift.
